home.title: Home Page
home.description: Manage the homepage hero, highlights, and featured sections.

heroSection.title: Hero Section
heroSection.description: Update your main landing message and call-to-action

placeholders.titleEn: Write the hero title in English
placeholders.descriptionEn: Write a short section description in English

ui.backgroundImageHint: Upload a wide image for best hero appearance.
ui.imageUploaded: Image uploaded. You can remove it and upload another one.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill in both Arabic and English fields so content is available in both languages.

briefSection.title: Brief Section
briefSection.description: Control this homepage section text and image

ui.imageHint: Upload the logo or image shown next to the text.
ui.imageUploaded: Image uploaded. You can remove it and upload another one.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill in Arabic and English content for bilingual display.

aboutSection.title: About Section
aboutSection.description: Manage the dedicated About block shown on the homepage.

ui.imageHint: Upload the image displayed on the right side of this section.
ui.imageUploaded: Image uploaded. You can remove it and upload another one.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill all Arabic and English fields so this section renders correctly in both languages.

statsSection.title: Statistics Section
statsSection.description: Manage the statistical information displayed on the homepage.

ui.isActiveHint: Enable to show this section on the homepage. Disable to hide it.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill in values and labels in both Arabic and English for bilingual display.

partnersSection.title: Partners Section
partnersSection.description: Manage partner logos and bilingual section content.

placeholders.contentAr: اكتب محتوى قسم الشركاء باللغة العربية
placeholders.contentEn: Write partners section content in English

ui.isActiveHint: Enable to show this section on the homepage. Disable to hide it.
ui.logosHint: Upload multiple partner logos. Repeat upload to add more logos.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill Arabic and English fields so this section appears in both languages.

contactSection.title: Contact Section
contactSection.description: Manage the contact gateway block with bilingual content and button label.

placeholders.contentAr: اكتب محتوى دعوة الإجراء باللغة العربية
placeholders.contentEn: Write contact section content in English

ui.bilingualHint: Fill Arabic and English fields so this contact section appears correctly in both languages.

projects.title: Website projects
projects.description: See what visitors see on the projects page, manage drafts, and publish new entries when ready.

sections.visibleHint: These entries are shown to visitors on the public projects page.
sections.draftsHint: Not visible on the site until you publish them.

empty.visible: No published projects yet. When you publish a project, it will appear here.

actions.publishComingSoon: The publishing flow will be available in a later update.

about.title: About Page
about.description: Manage the About page sections and bilingual content.

placeholders.eyebrowTitleEn: A Story of Trust and Vision

ui.backgroundImageHint: Upload a wide hero image for the About banner.
ui.imageUploaded: Image uploaded. You can remove it and upload another one.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill Arabic and English fields so this section appears in both languages.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save about hero section

storySection.title: Story Section
storySection.description: Manage the story headline and paragraph.

ui.bilingualHint: Fill Arabic and English fields to keep content synchronized in both locales.

visionMissionSection.title: Vision & Mission Section
visionMissionSection.description: Manage vision and mission blocks with center image.

ui.imageHint: Upload the center image shown between vision and mission blocks.
ui.imageUploaded: Image uploaded. You can remove it and upload another one.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill all Arabic and English fields for full bilingual rendering.

success.saved: Vision and mission section saved successfully

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save vision and mission section

valuesSection.title: Values Section
valuesSection.description: Manage section heading and the three values cards.

placeholders.firstContentEn: Write first card description in English
placeholders.secondContentEn: Write second card description in English
placeholders.thirdContentEn: Write third card description in English

ui.bilingualHint: Fill all Arabic and English fields for complete bilingual rendering.

boardSection.title: Board Section
boardSection.description: Manage board heading and members images.

ui.isActiveHint: Enable to show this section on the About page. Disable to hide it.
ui.membersHint: Upload board members images. Repeat upload to add more.
ui.bilingualHint: Fill Arabic and English headings so the section appears in both languages.

contact.title: Contact Page
contact.description: Manage the contact page hero text, sidebar copy, and shared contact channels.

heroInfoSection.title: Hero & contact sidebar
heroInfoSection.description: Top hero lines (no background image), sidebar intro, channels heading, phone, email, and social links.

ui.sharedContactHint: Phone, email, and social URLs are stored once and shown for both languages.
ui.bilingualHint: Hero and sidebar text can differ per language; contact details are shared.

settings.pageDescription: Brand colors, typography, logos, SEO defaults, and public contact details for your marketing site. Load them on the live site via the public API.

theme.title: Theme & colors
theme.description: Brand palette for the public site (hex values).

fonts.title: Typography
fonts.description: Font family names for Arabic and English on the public site (Google Fonts names or a full CSS stack with commas).
fonts.hint: Single names load via Google Fonts (weights 300–700). Use commas for stacks, e.g. system-ui, sans-serif.

logos.title: Logos
logos.description: Two variants so the mark stays legible on light and dark backgrounds.
logos.forDarkBgHint: Usually a light or white version for navbars and footers on dark UI.
logos.forLightBgHint: Usually a dark version for headers on white or light sections.

seo.title: SEO & metadata
seo.description: Defaults for meta tags and social sharing. Page-specific content can still override these.
seo.siteUrlHint: Canonical base URL (https) used for Open Graph and links.
seo.ogImageHint: Shown when links are shared. Around 1200×630 px works well for most platforms.
seo.twitterSiteHint: Site username for Twitter card attribution, e.g. @yourbrand.
seo.robotsAllowIndex: Allow search engines to index the site
seo.robotsHint: Turn off only for staging or pre-launch environments.
seo.faviconHint: Square image, ideally .ico or .png. Shown in browser tabs and bookmarks.

contact.title: Contact & analytics
contact.description: Public-facing contact details and measurement ID for your public frontend.
contact.emailHint: May be shown in the footer or structured data.
contact.gaHint: Example: G-XXXXXXXXXX. Returned by the public API for your site to initialize analytics.

pageSeo.title: Page SEO & metadata
pageSeo.description: Configure page-level SEO fields. Empty optional values will fallback to Website Settings defaults.
pageSeo.robotsHint: Use this page-level indexing flag when you need to override general site behavior.

errors.metaTitleMax: Meta title must be at most 200 characters.
errors.metaDescriptionMax: Meta description must be at most 500 characters.
errors.twitterHandleMax: X (Twitter) handle must be at most 100 characters.
errors.keywordsMax: Keywords must be at most 500 characters.

fields.robotsAllowIndex: Allow search engines to index this page
